selections.name: Coronation Day
selections.reason: Consistent performer with strong recent placings at Barcaldine and Alpha. Warwick Satherley is a key booking.

selections.name: Circus Maximus
selections.reason: Fitter for recent runs, including a solid second at Ilfracombe last start.

selections.name: Just A Cosmic Girl
selections.reason: Strips fitter second-up after a close third at Ilfracombe. Excellent draw.

selections.name: Bella Russian
selections.reason: Mitch Goring takes the ride from the inside alley. Capable of showing early speed.

danger_horse.name: Acres Destiny
danger_horse.reason: Well-supported on debut and can improve with experience.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #8, Exacta Box 1-8-10, Trifecta 8 / 1,10 / ALL

selections.name: Little Cointreau (NZ)
selections.reason: Classy gelding with multiple runner-up finishes in Open and Benchmark company. The one to beat.

selections.name: Heavenly Legend
selections.reason: Strong second at Barcaldine last start and is a proven performer on outback dirt.

selections.name: Schmoozer
selections.reason: Capable of a much better run back in this grade; won at Longreach over a mile two starts back.

selections.name: Inquisitive Legend
selections.reason: Solid fourth at Barcaldine and gets the advantage of the inside rail.

danger_horse.name: Pocket Picker
danger_horse.reason: Won well at Richmond two starts back and must be respected.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #3, Exacta Box 2-3, Trifecta 3 / 2,4 / ALL

selections.name: Testator Silens
selections.reason: Elite class performer who carried 143 lbs to a close second at Ilfracombe. Hard to hold out.

selections.name: Invincible Red
selections.reason: In superb form after a dominant 2.25-length victory at Charleville last start.

selections.name: Hurtle
selections.reason: Proven outback specialist who will appreciate the tempo of this race.

selections.name: Acedrod
selections.reason: Winner at Cunnamulla over 7f two starts back; drawn to get a soft run.

danger_horse.name: Deciduous
danger_horse.reason: Capable of matching these on his best form.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #1, Exacta Box 1-5, Trifecta 1 / 2,5 / ALL

selections.name: Day To Remember
selections.reason: Impressive winner at Ilfracombe last start and maps perfectly from barrier 3.

selections.name: Oakfield Montana
selections.reason: Strong maiden winner at Charleville last start and gets in well here.

selections.name: Claw Machine
selections.reason: Toowoomba maiden winner who has the early speed to utilize the inside draw.

selections.name: Solar Surfer
selections.reason: Resuming after a maiden win at Gatton. Classy but has to overcome a wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Galath (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Nice third at Ilfracombe last start.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #4, Exacta Box 4-11e, Trifecta 4 / 3,11e / ALL

selections.name: Highground
selections.reason: Back to his preferred sprint distance and gets the critical inside rail advantage.

selections.name: Transceltic
selections.reason: Highly consistent with consecutive runner-up finishes at Charleville and Injune.

selections.name: Tokyo Sins
selections.reason: Strong third at Alpha two starts back; possesses good tactical speed.

selections.name: Zouchase
selections.reason: Gained a start and has the form to be highly competitive in this grade.

danger_horse.name: Flying Rupert
danger_horse.reason: Fast beginner who can cross if he jumps cleanly.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #6, Exacta Box 3-6, Trifecta 6 / 3,5 / ALL

selections.name: Blue Roman
selections.reason: Gained a start and looks extremely well-weighted after the 3kg apprentice claim.

selections.name: Final Mission
selections.reason: Dominant 3.5-length winner at Ilfracombe last start; in peak form.

selections.name: Windorah
selections.reason: Capable of showing sharp improvement back to this distance.

selections.name: Toy Story
selections.reason: Nice third at Charleville last start and maps to get a lovely trail.

danger_horse.name: Crown Reach
danger_horse.reason: Strong winner at Richmond three starts back.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #12e, Exacta Box 7-12e, Trifecta 12e / 5,7 / ALL

selections.name: Final Comment
selections.reason: Impressive winner at Barcaldine last start and is racing in career-best form.

selections.name: Eastcoast Hussler
selections.reason: Narrow winner at Ilfracombe last start and maps beautifully from barrier 3.

selections.name: Shez Lethal
selections.reason: Richmond winner two starts back who can bounce back from a wide draw.

selections.name: Divine Courage
selections.reason: Solid third at Ilfracombe last start and is always competitive in this grade.

danger_horse.name: Monday Choice
danger_horse.reason: Nice third at Barcaldine last start.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #3, Exacta Box 3-4, Trifecta 3 / 4,5 / ALL
